34cf5cdd12a79058a777db423c8f7c190c5fa00a: {"table_description": "A customer reference table where each row represents a single customer, capturing a unique customer identifier and the geographic region the customer belongs to.", "columns": [{"name": "id", "description": "Unique integer identifier for each customer; sample values (10, 20) are distinct with no nulls, indicating a primary key.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "region", "description": "Geographic region the customer is associated with, drawn from a small set of named areas such as North and South.", "role": "category"}], "clarifications": []}
a0150b860d3b5b223841af2436049db71fc396ab: {"table_description": "A small order table with 3 rows. Each record represents a single order, linking a customer (via customer_id, a required foreign key to customers.csv.id) to a quantity of items ordered.", "columns": [{"name": "order_id", "description": "Unique numeric identifier for each order; no nulls and fully distinct across all rows, serving as the table's primary key.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "customer_id", "description": "Numeric reference to the customer who placed the order; a required foreign key to customers.csv.id. No nulls, with 2 distinct customers across the 3 orders.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "quantity", "description": "The number of items ordered, an integer measure with no nulls (sample values 1-3).", "role": "measure"}], "clarifications": []}
ccad5d1caf62ae72dd29827e43a2a05d2c731881: {"table_description": "An order line table where each row represents a single order, capturing a unique order identifier, the customer who placed it (a foreign key to customers.csv.id), and the quantity ordered.", "columns": [{"name": "order_id", "description": "Unique integer identifier for each order; sample values (1, 2, 3) are distinct with no nulls, indicating a primary key.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "customer_id", "description": "Identifier of the customer who placed the order; a required foreign key referencing customers.csv.id, with values such as 10 and 20.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "quantity", "description": "Number of units ordered; a non-null integer measure with sample values 1, 2, and 3.", "role": "measure"}], "clarifications": []}
d23accd08dd6fa2c6c82b90ab67aa42aaee0cb08: {"table_description": "A customer reference table where each row represents a single customer, identified by a unique id and tagged with a geographic region. The id column is referenced as a required foreign key by orders.csv.customer_id.", "columns": [{"name": "id", "description": "Unique integer identifier for each customer; sample values (10, 20) are distinct with no nulls, indicating a primary key referenced by orders.csv.customer_id.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "region", "description": "Geographic region the customer belongs to; a non-null categorical text field with values such as North and South.", "role": "category"}], "clarifications": []}
